name: Iron Core Specimen Lab
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>鋼</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>核</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>合</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>成</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>研</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>究</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>所</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じょ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: During each of your End Phases, destroy this card unless you reveal 1 "Iron Core of Koa'ki Meiru" in your hand. Each time a "Koa'ki Meiru" monster on the field is destroyed during the End Phase, its owner can add 1 "Koa'ki Meiru" monster from their Deck to their hand.
eff: During each of your End Phases, destroy this card unless you reveal 1 "Iron Core of Koa'ki Meiru" in your hand. Each time a "Koa'ki Meiru" monster on the field is destroyed during the End Phase, its owner can add 1 "Koa'ki Meiru" monster from their Deck to their hand.
